_description: Configuration for compute-self-eval.mjs. Edit these values to tune the pressure formula without touching the script. Decisions: GAD-D-75, GAD-D-79, GAD-D-115, GAD-D-145.

pressure._shannon_framing: tasks_total is raw phase complexity (H approximation), crosscuts represent mutual-information between subsystems (I(X;Y)), the weighted sum is total information burden on the agent. Crosscut_weight is high because cross-cutting work requires holding multiple system contexts simultaneously, roughly doubling mental state.

crosscut_detection._description: A task counts as a crosscut if its goal text mentions at least `min_systems_to_count` of the `systems` keywords.
